overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a dark server room through modern living spaces, up a staircase, to a rooftop infinity pool overlooking a futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

events.description: exits dark server room through doorway into brightly lit living space

agents.ego_description: walking through a high-tech server room toward a brightly lit exit doorway

entered.detail: tall black server racks with blinking indicator lights
multiple screens displaying green code and data readouts
bright yellow metal ladder against the back wall
desk with multiple monitors and control interfaces
large holographic weapon inventory interface on the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit, high-tech server room filled with racks of equipment and glowing monitors. The camera moves forward through the narrow space toward a doorway emitting bright natural light, transitioning from the artificial green glow of the monitors to the warm sunlight of the adjacent living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern luxury living room with panoramic city views

events.description: approaches elevator door at the end of the living area

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious living area, observing the modern furniture and city views through floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing the city outside
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through the windows
sleek contemporary sofa with dark upholstery
low black coffee table with reflective surface
tall wooden room divider with vertical panels
dark metal elevator doors with green indicator light

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a spacious, sunlit living area with polished dark floors and modern minimalist furniture. Floor-to-ceiling windows on the right reveal a stunning futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers. The camera moves toward an elevator door at the far end of the room, passing a contemporary sofa and coffee table.

events.description: enters hallway from living area through wooden door
begins ascending the staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through an art-lined hallway and climbing a modern staircase with glass railings

entered.detail: colorful abstract paintings mounted on the hallway walls
green plants in white rectangular planters
dark wood panel door with metal handle
floating wooden stairs with open risers and glass railing
transparent glass balustrade along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a wooden door into a narrow, elegantly decorated hallway featuring abstract art and potted plants. It continues toward and begins ascending a modern floating staircase with glass railings, moving from the ground floor toward the upper level of the penthouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with infinity pool overlooking the city

events.description: emerges from staircase onto rooftop terrace with panoramic city views
sunlight reflects off the infinity pool surface creating bright glare

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop terrace, admiring the infinity pool and the futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: rectangular reflecting pool with water level flush with the deck
large rectangular planters with greenery along the terrace edge
tall cylindrical and blocky towers with industrial detailing
large glowing digital advertisement floating above buildings
modern lounge chairs and tables on the wooden deck

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a stunning rooftop terrace featuring an infinity pool that reflects the clear blue sky. The space offers unobstructed panoramic views of a dense futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers, industrial structures, and holographic billboards. The camera moves along the wooden deck, passing modern outdoor furniture and planters while taking in the breathtaking urban vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level lounge with terrace access

events.description: enters the upper lounge from the rooftop terrace
looks back out through glass doors at the brightly lit terrace and pool

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper lounge area, examining the modern furniture and looking out at the terrace and city views

entered.detail: long white upholstered sofa with wooden frame
contemporary armchairs with white cushions and dark frames
large textured painting on the dark wall
sleek bar area with bottles and glassware
large sliding glass doors leading back to the pool terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into an upper level lounge featuring sophisticated white furniture and dark walls adorned with abstract art. The space is illuminated by warm artificial lighting and natural light streaming through glass doors that offer views of the rooftop pool and distant city skyline. The camera explores the seating area and bar before turning back toward the terrace entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, high-tech interior toward an expansive, sun-drenched rooftop overlooking a futuristic metropolis. It begins in a dark server room filled with glowing monitors, moving forward through a narrow space until the artificial green light gives way to the warm sunlight of a spacious, minimalist living area. As the camera passes through a wooden door and ascends a floating glass staircase, the interior environment shifts from open living spaces to an elegant, narrow hallway. The scene then opens onto a stunning rooftop terrace featuring an infinity pool that reflects the clear blue sky and offers panoramic views of towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. Finally, the camera moves from the wooden deck into an upper-level lounge with sophisticated white furniture and dark walls, blending warm artificial lighting with the distant urban vista.
